title: Egypt Illia's Add-on
description: This addon add new custom miraculous!
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e621c7afce3c4a2b3f5eaf484c234fba7425f1a6.png)

# Ideas not Confermed may change
<details>
<summary>Cobra Power</summary>
The power of the cobra is difficult to explain, so I will explain it with an example. Let's imagine that I am Cobra Holder
and Dragoss is my victim. If I press X, a menu will open where I enter the name Dragoss. I teleport to the main mind of Cobra Holder. This main mind looks like a sandstorm. In it I find an NPC with the name "Dragoss", if I write something in the chat next to this NPC, then Dragoss will have a message from an unknown player in the chats, and blindness will appear in it. That is, only he can hear us. By pressing RMB on the NPC, a menu with different powers opens. (each power requires concentration from Cobra Holder, I will talk about the concentration system later)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Mind Effect</summary>
Using this power, I can give Dragoss a headache, Hallucination, Forgetfulness, Blindness and other effects related to the head. (If you are very focused you can paralyze the player for a while)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Mind Location</summary>
This power only works if you are very focused. Using this power I can see everything Dragoss sees I can see what he is doing and where he is. But after 15 seconds you return to the main mind (if you are not an adult you teleport to your body
</details>

<details>
<summary>Mind Memories</summary>
This power can only be used when you are an adult and very focused. Using this power I teleport Dragoss to the world of memories. This is a world from different moments in the life of Cobra Holder. Dragoss needs to find a way out of the memories for this you need to find a way out of 3 memories. In the last 4 memories he must find a biome similar to a sandstorm, going inside he teleports to the Cobra's Holder's Main Mind there he must find his NPC and hit him and he teleports into his body and will receive immunity from the power of the cobra for a while. Also the cobra holder can chase him.

I want to note that if in the real world the cobra holder is hit he teleports into his body. 
</details>

**Mods are required:Geckolib API, Curios API, Kleider`s Custom Renderer API, Natya's Miracle Stones -PhoenixMiraculous-Give you the power of Fire (Currently has 12 suit preferences that you can choose for transformation!)**
